case_title: SEAN BRUCE MACPHEE VS. PAUL KIM

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MACPHEE, SEAN BRUCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,661.81 FILED BY MACPHEE, SEAN BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
